title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TIBLE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SIPOCOT, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 305 / 55 OG No. 17, 3088 (April 27, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2113, April 05, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TIBLE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SIPOCOT, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Tigman, Belnas, Cacao, and Binatagan in the Municipality of Sipocot, Province of Camarines Sur, are constituted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Tible.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 5, 1959.
